evals.name: english-exact-domains
evals.prompt: Check whether these exact domains are available through REG.RU: example.ru, probably-free-2026-test-domain.ru, example.com. Use my configured environment credentials.
evals.expected_output: Runs the bundled regru domain check script with the exact domains, reports available domains first, then unavailable/errors, and does not suggest buying or registering.

evals.name: russian-language-output
evals.prompt: Проверь через Рег.ру, свободны ли домены primer-test-2026.ru и ya.ru. Ответь по-русски.
evals.expected_output: Uses the regru script with exact domains and returns a Russian-language summary matching the prompt language.

evals.name: mixed-valid-invalid-domains
evals.prompt: Use REG.RU API 2 to check this mixed list exactly as domains, not suggestions: ya.ru, a.ru, qqqq-example-check-2026.com, qqйй.com.
evals.expected_output: Reports each exact domain status, treating only result Available as available and surfacing invalid-domain error codes/messages for invalid names.

evals.name: missing-credentials
evals.prompt: Can you check if mydomain-example.ru is free on reg.ru? I haven't set any REG.RU credentials in this shell yet.
evals.expected_output: Explains that REGRU_USERNAME and REGRU_PASSWORD are required environment variables and does not ask the user to paste secrets into chat.

evals.name: ssl-auth-config
evals.prompt: Check example.ru through REG.RU using my env auth. I have REGRU_SSL_CERT_PATH and REGRU_SSL_KEY_PATH set for API client certificate auth.
evals.expected_output: Uses the bundled script, which automatically sends client SSL cert/key when both SSL env vars are set, while still requiring username/password.

evals.name: non-reseller-account
evals.prompt: I added my IP to the REG.RU API whitelist, but checking domains returns RESELLER_AUTH_FAILED. What does that mean?
evals.expected_output: Explains that domain/check is partner/reseller-only in REG.RU API 2 and that a non-reseller account can authenticate but cannot use this exact availability endpoint.
